name: SRC
description: SRC, Inc. is a not-for-profit research and development company focused on advanced electronic warfare (EW) and processing technologies that enhance defense operations. description: Mercury Systems specializes in developing innovative solutions for electronic warfare (EW), providing advanced technology that supports directed energy weapons and electronic protection systems. description: Terma specializes in providing mission-critical solutions in defense and security, including advanced technology for electronic warfare (EW) integration. name: Ewa Government Systems, Inc.
description: EWA Government Systems Inc. (EWA GSI) is a leading organization in Electronic Warfare, with over 40 years of experience and expertise in threat systems, simulation, and EW software/hardware products. name: Datapatterns India
description: Data Patterns is a specialized provider of Defence and Aerospace electronics solutions, with a strong focus on developing high reliability products for the defense sector. name: Bird Technologies
description: Bird is a trusted authority in RF communications, specializing in RF spectrum signal analysis crucial for electronic warfare. With over 80 years of industry experience, Bird sets new standards in RF test and measurement, making it a critical choice for mission-critical applications.

name: DEWC
description: DEWC Services is a veteran-owned company specializing in electronic warfare (EW) and has been supporting the Australian Defence Force (ADF) in enhancing its EW and intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) capabilities since 2011. With a team of experienced engineers and technicians, DEWC Services focuses on mastering the electromagnetic spectrum to ensure effective C4ISREW capabilities for Defence clients.
